name: Decathlon Nederland
regions: national (Amsterdam, Rotterdam, Den Haag, Utrecht, Eindhoven, Groningen and more)
best_contact_role: Customer Service / Pers via Persberichten page
why_target: Largest sports big-box in NL with own-brand Kipsta football line plus Nike/adidas; will be the volume retailer for Oranje WC2026 replica kit, shin guards and training balls; press team actively pushes campaigns through decathlon.nl/Persberichten
notes: Operated by Decathlon Netherlands BV (KvK 34306685). HQ Hoogoorddreef 15 Gebouw Amerika, 1101 BA Amsterdam. NL email format first@decathlon.nl per RocketReach (unverified). Press releases hub at decathlon.nl/Persberichten_lp-9NANWG.

name: Intersport Nederland
regions: national (~60 stores incl. Hoevelaken, Amersfoort HQ + Twin Sport family franchises)
why_target: Largest sports franchise co-op in NL via INTERSPORT Nederland BV; member stores carry Nike/adidas/Puma WC2026 boots and replica kits; co-op model means individual franchisees can sign up to a prediction-pool promo without head-office bottleneck
notes: HQ Modemweg 29-35, 3821 BS Amersfoort plus office Koninginneweg 1, 3871 JZ Hoevelaken. WhatsApp 06-23959425. Paul Segers is Marketing en E-commerce Manager (per RocketReach). Twin Sport family franchise also runs Intersport Twinsport sites in Amsterdam Buitenveldert and elsewhere.

name: Foot Locker Nederland
regions: national mall presence (Amsterdam, Rotterdam, Utrecht, Eindhoven, Den Haag and more)
why_target: Mall-anchored sneaker giant; carries WC2026 Adidas + Nike replica jerseys and lifestyle football crossover; EMEA HQ moved to Creative Valley Utrecht so NL marketing decisions are local
notes: Foot Locker Europe.com BV (KvK 30181126). Legal HQ Ir. D.S. Tuijnmanweg 3-5, 4131 PN Vianen; EMEA office now Creative Valley Utrecht near Centraal Station. Phone 0347-805000. Klantenservice mailbox vragen@footlocker.eu services all EMEA so a NL-marketing inbox is not public.

name: JD Sports Nederland
regions: national (Rotterdam, Amsterdam, Utrecht, Den Haag and more)
why_target: UK sneaker chain with deep WC2026 Nike/adidas/Puma boot and replica jersey stock; mall foot traffic; growing NL footprint post-Aktiesport vacuum
notes: NL HQ Lijnbaan 77 Rotterdam. Group HQ JD Sports Fashion Group plc, Hollinsbrook Way, Pilsworth, Bury BL9 8RR (UK). Escalation Privacy.Support@jdplc.com. NL marketing manager name not public on website; LinkedIn search likely surfaces.

name: Snipes Nederland
regions: national (Amsterdam, Rotterdam, Utrecht, Den Haag, Eindhoven and more)
why_target: Streetwear sneaker chain with strong Nike/adidas football lifestyle crossover (Mercurial, Predator); Snipes Clique loyalty programme already runs sneaker drops, so WC2026 prediction overlay is a natural fit
notes: Snipes Nederland BV. HQ Van Liemptstraat 10, 5145 RB Waalwijk. Phone 088 864 23 23. Owned by Sumolight Holding / Deichmann group (DE).

name: Sports World (Frasers Group)
regions: national (Amstelveen, Amsterdam Johan Cruijff Boulevard, Arnhem, Almere, Assen, Breda, Nijmegen, Tilburg, Zwolle)
best_contact_role: Frasers Group NL Marketing / Accent partner
why_target: Frasers Group's post-Perry Sport NL play; opened 9 new Sports World stores in 2024 incl. flagship at Johan Cruijff Boulevard 51 Amsterdam (the Ajax precinct); deep replica kit and boot stock from Everlast, Slazenger, Karrimor plus adidas/Nike
notes: Operates ex-Perry Sport / Aktiesport / Sprinter / Twin Sport real estate post-acquisitions 2024-2025. Frasers Group acquired Twin Sport BV May 2024 (ACM approval) and took 10+ Sprinter sites. NL retail brand consolidates under 'Sports Direct' / 'Sports World' fascias. Help centre help.sportsworld.nl handles klantenservice.

name: Sport 2000 Nederland
regions: national (Bene Sita Trading BV co-op, ~50 members)
why_target: NL arm of European Sport 2000 co-op; member stores carry adidas/Nike/Puma football kit; each franchisee runs own marketing budget so opt-in is fast
notes: Trading entity Bene Sita Trading BV. HQ Buizerdlaan 6, 3435 SB Nieuwegein. Klantenservice Monday-Saturday 09:00-16:00. Sport 2000 stores often co-located with running specialists.

name: DAKA Sport & Lifestyle
regions: national (~17 stores incl. Rotterdam, Den Haag, Capelle aan den IJssel and more)
why_target: NL-owned 17-store chain plus webshop; stocks football boots and Oranje replica kit; HQ in Capelle aan den IJssel handles all NL marketing decisions so single point of contact
notes: Trading entity Daka Sport BV. HQ Dalkruidbaan, Capelle aan den IJssel. Klantenservice 010 262 0971. Strong Rotterdam region presence so natural Feyenoord adjacency.

name: Score
why_target: Score Retail Nederland BV streetwear-meets-sport chain; carries Nike/adidas football lifestyle and replica kits; strong student-city footprint (Maastricht, Groningen) means high WC2026 engagement
notes: Score Retail Nederland BV based Tilburg. Stores Kleine Staat 14 Maastricht (043-326 2808) and Herestraat 52B Groningen (050-311 0708). Thursday late opening to 21:00. Streetwear angle good for younger demographic.

name: Voetbalshop.nl
regions: national online + showroom Utrecht (also Amsterdam, Alkmaar, Groningen warehousing entities)
why_target: Self-styled 'grootste voetbalwinkel van Nederland'; runs official KNVB Teamwear Programme into amateur clubs; massive Oranje + international team replica catalogue; teamwear team already has direct lines to club committees
notes: Operated by Badge Direct BV (KvK 30119164). HQ Krommewetering 31-41, 3543 AP Utrecht. Teamwear inbox teamwear@voetbalshop.nl. Sister sites Voetbalshop.be (BE) and Subside Sports. Powers Voetbalshop fanshop pages for all Eredivisie clubs.

name: KNVB Shop
why_target: Official Dutch FA webshop for Oranje and Leeuwinnen kit; Nike licensee; primary destination for fans buying the WC2026 home and away jerseys; federation has direct push channels into supporters database
notes: Operated by KNVB (Koninklijke Nederlandse Voetbalbond), Woudenbergseweg 56-58, 3707 HX Zeist (KNVB Campus). Commercial structure ties Nike licence to KNVB. No public commercial inbox; KNVB pers contact knvb.nl/over-ons/contact best escalation route.

name: Voetbalfanshop.nl
why_target: More Footballs BV; affordable official merch focused on European clubs plus Oranje; runs the official online fanshops for several Eredivisie clubs; pure-play football retailer = fast yes
notes: More Footballs BV. HQ Maagdenburgstraat 36, 7421 ZD Deventer. Klantenservice 09:00-17:00 weekdays (Friday to 15:00).

name: VoetbalDirect.nl
why_target: Pure-play football e-tailer; dedicated amateurverenigingen-contact channel for club bulk orders; runs the VVCS / Voetbaldirect official VVCS-members webshop so already partner-minded
notes: HQ Elisabethhof 25, 2353 EW Leiderdorp. Klantenservice 0252-707077 (weekdays 09:00-21:00, weekends 10:00-17:00). Complaints klachten@voetbaldirect.nl. Listed on Thuiswinkel.org.

name: 11teamsports Nederland
regions: national online + 3 physical stores (Apeldoorn HQ, Utrecht, Eindhoven)
why_target: DE-owned football specialist running NL/BE/LU from Apeldoorn HQ; combines retail + teamwear B2B into amateur clubs; covers all major boot and jersey brands; multilingual website already
notes: 11Teamsports Benelux Webshop BV. HQ Tweelingenlaan 37, 7324 AP Apeldoorn. Parent 11teamsports GmbH (Crailsheim DE). Phone weekdays 10:00-13:00.

name: Soccerfanshop.nl
why_target: NL-owned football fanshop with physical store in Breda and online since 2008; deep international replica jersey catalogue; community-rooted in NAC Breda heartland
notes: HQ Haagdijk 35, 4811 TT Breda. Phone 076 205 5265. WhatsApp 06-22333611. Owner-operator scale = quick decision.

name: Subside Sports
why_target: Self-described 'one of the largest suppliers of football merchandise in the world' since 1997; 6000+ products incl. retro and current Oranje + Eredivisie kit; pure-play football merch = perfect fit
notes: Subside Sports BV (KvK 27368887). Correspondence Heerenweg 6 A12, 2222 AM Katwijk. Phone 0900-7827433 (weekdays 09:00-17:00). Listed on Thuiswinkel.org.

name: Unisport.nl
why_target: Danish-founded (1995) 'world's leading online football store'; full Oranje + national-team catalogue plus boots and goalkeeper gloves; runs Unisport community content so prediction-pool overlay aligns with their fan-engagement playbook
notes: Operated by Unisport.com ApS (DK). NL klantenservice via faq/account-voorwaarden/contactgegevens. Maandag-donderdag 10:00-16:00 en vrijdag 10:00-15:00. Strong YouTube + content brand under @UnisportLife.

name: COPA Football
why_target: Amsterdam-born retro football brand; 300m2 flagship at Prins Hendrikkade 21-A opposite Centraal Station; brand DNA is retro football storytelling so a Tournamental prediction pool that taps WC nostalgia (Cruijff '74, Bergkamp '98) is a natural co-marketing angle
notes: Operated by COPA Football BV (Amsterdam). Founded 1998. Brand-led so a story-first pitch lands well; cite Total Football heritage.

name: Smit-Cruyff
why_target: Iconic Amsterdam football specialist since 1940; the shop is intertwined with Johan Cruijff's personal mythology (he wore their boots as a boy); Cruyff name + WC2026 angle = press story not just outreach
notes: Elandsgracht 98, 1016 VA Amsterdam. Phone 020-6231735. Listed contact via /contact and /service pages. Cruyff connection makes this an essential NL pilot store. info@smit-cruyff.nl inferred-pattern (unverified).

name: Bob van der Heijden Sport
why_target: 80+ year Rotterdam running + football specialist; deep Feyenoord catchment in Rotterdam Noord; supplies kit to Albeda College and several amateur clubs so already inside the club channel
notes: Address Bergselaan 332-C, 3038 CN Rotterdam. Phone (010) 465 8442. Family-owned. xs4all.nl email is the long-published direct line.

name: De Wit Schijndel
why_target: Famed Brabant retail destination (70000m2 across 3 halls and 13 departments); huge football department with all major boot brands; PSV catchment so Oranje + PSV jersey demand is locked in
notes: Address Rooiseweg 22, 5481 SJ Schijndel. Phone 073-549 23 56. Family business. Sport mode hall is one of NL's largest single sports floors.

name: Ajax Fanshop
regions: Amsterdam (Johan Cruijff ArenA + Kalverstraat city store + online)
why_target: Eredivisie giant; Adidas-kitted; flagship at Johan Cruijff Boulevard 1-3 sits next to the ArenA; massive supporter base means single biggest club-retail outreach in NL; Oranje stars (Memphis, De Ligt history) drive WC2026 spillover
notes: Operated by AFC Ajax NV (listed Euronext Amsterdam). Phone 0900-232 2529. Open Monday-Saturday 09:30-18:00, Sunday 11:00-18:00. Commercial escalation via ajax.nl/contact.

name: PSV FANstore
regions: Eindhoven (PSV Stadion Philips + City Store Marktstraat + online)
why_target: Reigning Eredivisie champions; Puma-kitted (deep Puma WC2026 boot crossover); Stadium store at Stadionplein 4 plus PSV Eindhoven City Store at Marktstraat 3 in the centre; Eindhoven is also Decathlon and Score adjacent so cross-promotion potential
notes: Operated by PSV NV. Phone +31 40 250 5505. Tuesday-Saturday 10:00-17:00, Monday from 12:00. WhatsApp customer service available.

name: Feyenoord Fanshop
why_target: Cult-status Eredivisie club; Castore-kitted (UK technical partner); Van Zandvlietplein 19 stadium store at De Kuip is a matchday landmark; Feyenoord-Rotterdam pride means WC2026 Oranje + retro Feyenoord overlays drive cross-sell
notes: Operated by Feyenoord Rotterdam NV. Phone fanshop 010-432 44 40. Two Rotterdam fanshops at De Kuip plus De Coolsingel. Contact via fanshop.feyenoord.nl/pages/contact. Email pattern inferred (unverified); confirmed channel is chat + contact form.

name: AZ Alkmaar Fancentrum
why_target: Eredivisie regular with strong Noord-Holland fanbase; runs merch via Fancentrum at AFAS Stadion and partner The Merchandise Company; multiple Oranje youth internationals come through AZ academy so WC2026 narrative is natural
notes: Operated by AZ Alkmaar NV. Phone 072 547 80 31. Mailing Antwoordnummer 333, 1800 VB Alkmaar. Merchandise partner The Merchandise Company BV, Tolhuisweg 2, 6071 RG Swalmen, info@themerchandisecompany.com.

name: FC Twente Fanstore
why_target: Eredivisie club with Castore as teamwear and merchandise partner since 2024; Grolsch Veste store is Twente's matchday focal point; Dutch-speaking staff but commercial escalation routes through Castore UK
notes: Phone +31 53 852 55 21. Colosseum 65, 7521 PP Enschede. Castore manages both the fanstore and webshop. FC Twente commercial inbox commercie@fctwente.nl is the parallel escalation.

name: FC Utrecht Fanshop
why_target: Eredivisie regular at Galgenwaard; Castore-kitted; central Utrecht catchment means high foot traffic during WC2026; strong working relationship with Voetbalshop.nl (same city) for distribution
notes: Address Herculesplein 241 Utrecht. Phone 030 888 5560. Match-day hours from 2 hours pre-kickoff to 45 min post-match. Online klantenservice page shop.fcutrecht.nl/pages/fc-utrecht-fanshop-klantenservice.

name: FC Groningen Store
why_target: Eredivisie / KKD club with deep Noord-Nederland fanbase; FanStore at Boumaboulevard 41 entrance of Euroborg; runs province-wide merchandise distribution so already partner-minded with regional retail
notes: Operated by FC Groningen NV. FanStore Tuesday-Friday 12:00-17:00 plus 2 hours pre-kickoff. Office Monday-Friday 09:00-17:00. Provincial reseller network so easy regional rollout.

name: Sparta Rotterdam Fanshop
why_target: Oldest pro club in NL (founded 1888); De Rood-Witte Winkel in west wing of historic Kasteel stadium; smaller fanbase than Feyenoord but loyal so prediction-pool engagement rates lift
notes: Sparta Rotterdam Fanshop Spartastraat 11, 3027 ER Rotterdam. Phone 010 890 92 85.

name: Vitesse Fanshop
why_target: Eredivisie/KKD club with GelreDome store plus downtown Arnhem fanshop on Jansstraat (in partnership with Voetbalshop Arnhem); Robey-kitted so additional teamwear retail tie-in
notes: Phone WhatsApp 06-82454276. Mailing Batavierenweg 25, 6841 HN Arnhem. Fanservice@vitesse.nl is the supporter inbox; shop@vitesse.nl is the commerce inbox.

name: Heracles Almelo Fanshop
why_target: Twente-region Eredivisie/KKD club; two fanshops (Asito stadium + Almelo city centre); deep amateur-club ties in Overijssel which lifts prediction-pool seeding
notes: FanServiceShop at Van Riemsdijkplein 1; Fanshop Stad at Grotestraat 118, Almelo. Phone 0546-817070.

name: NEC Nijmegen Fanshop
why_target: Eredivisie side with deep Gelderland following; Fanshop at Goffertstadion in former reception space; recently launched independent necfanshop.nl webshop so commercially nimble
notes: Phone WhatsApp 0683331304. Weekdays 10:00-17:00. Match-day hours from 2 hours pre-kickoff and 30 min post-final whistle.

name: Go Ahead Eagles Fanshop
why_target: Eredivisie/KKD veteran (founded 1902); Adelaarshorst fanstore plus Intratuin Deventer pop-up partnership; community-rooted Deventer brand with strong supporter scene around ADHD ultras
notes: Fanstore inbox fanstore@ga-eagles.nl; webshop inbox webshop@ga-eagles.nl. Phone 0570 - 621357 (Tuesday-Friday 09:30-12:00 and 13:00-16:00).
